title: Binu the Brave Bird
content: Once there was a small bird named Binu. Binu was afraid to fly. One day, a strong wind lifted him into the sky. At first he was scared, but then he felt free and happy. From that day, Binu learned that trying new things can be exciting.

questions.questionText: What did Luna find in the cave?
How did Binu feel after the wind lifted him?
What did Binu learn from his adventure?
options: Trying new things can be exciting
